channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Industria 2 Suffers Last-Minute Delay on Launch Day
item.content:encoded:
Industria 2, a single-player post-apocalyptic title with promise, has just been delayed by developer Bleakmill on launch day. The game, which is a first-person title with puzzle-solving elements, chilling enemies, and sumptuous visuals, was due to launch today on PC.

Following an announcement from Bleakmill and Headup, the game’s publisher, Industria 2 has been postponed to April 29.

Industria 2 Delayed To Ensure Quality

In a statement, the team at Bleakmill explained:

Turns out finishing a high fidelity singleplayer FPS campaign with a team of 8 is hard. We are punching above our weights with this one once again. On one hand, this is exactly why it’s exciting for us and apparently for a lot of people out there. Hearing from players and testers that this game sometimes can feel close to the games that inspired us growing up, like Half-Life, Bioshock and Resident Evil, is unbelievably beautiful and motivating.

On the other hand, it’s sometimes overwhelmingly difficult for our tiny team scattered around the globe to make it fully click without burning out and being able to pay everyone fairly every month. A hard balance between passion and the reality of paying bills that most creatives out there face.

Industria 2 is the sequel to the game of the same(ish) name that was released on PC in 2021. It rose to Mostly Positive in the review ratings on the Valve-backed platform, pulling in thousands of players and inviting them to explore an atmospheric title fraught with haunting sequences and mystery.

This new title builds on that universe, five years later.

Bleakmill and Headup released a demo for the game in October 2025, and since it surfaced, it has pulled in positive reviews from hundreds of impressed gamers eager to get their hands on the finished product.

When delivered, Industria 2 will boast an immersive, narrative core, vivid enemies, a unique setting, and cinematic audio at its finest. If you want to know what you’re getting into with Industria 2, head over to Steam and install the short demo.

Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server if you’re interested in Industria 2.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Diablo 4 might come to Switch 2

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Does Saros Have Early Access? Saros Demo Status, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Early access is a blessing for people without patience, but it can play havoc with the bank account. If you’re looking to venture onto Carcosa for the first time, either via early access or a demo, this guide has the latest.

Saros is easily one of the most anticipated games of 2026 and one of two massive Sony PS5-only exclusives releasing in 2026—joining Wolverine. It’s the eagerly awaited sequel to Returnal, and Arjun replaces Returnal’s Selene as the lead role in a Housemarque AAA game.

Can You Play Saros Early Access?

Saros does offer the chance to play 48 hours early via an early access promotion.

If the wait for April 30 is proving to be too much, then there is a world (NOT filled with hostile lifeforms trying to kill you) where you can have Saros installed and ready to play two full days ahead of the worldwide launch.

  • More Insider Gaming: Saros Stars Again During 2026 Sony State of Play

As you can probably imagine, this isn’t a free offer, and if you do want Saros early access, there’s a literal price to pay.

How To Play Saros Early Access

You need to pre-purchase the Digital Deluxe Edition of Saros to secure your place in the 48-hour early access window and start playing Saros from April 28.

Here’s everything you need to know about securing Saros early access:

  1. Go to the PlayStation Store.
  2. Search for Saros.
  3. Click on the game.
  4. Scroll down and make sure you select Saros Digital Deluxe Edition.
  5. Now, press to pre-order Saros.
  6. Complete the purchase.
  7. Early access is secured—find out Saros’ game file size and preload date.

Follow all these steps, and you should be playing Saros two days early.

Does Saros Have A Demo?

Right now, Saros does not have a demo allowing you to try the game before you purchase it, or if you need a piece of the cake right now.

Unfortunately, the closet you’re going to get to Saros (unless Housemarque decides to drop a demo AFTER this article is published) is by playing Returnal, as it’s the next best thing!

  • More Insider Gaming: SAROS Dev Housemarque Staffing up for Next Project

Returnal is currently under the PlayStation Plus Extra wing of the subscription service. So, if you’re on the tier, you can play Returnal for free, and this should give you some idea of how Saros will look, sound, and play.

Whether you’re going to play Saros early or wait for launch day, discuss your thoughts on Saros with the Insider Gaming Discord Server. You can talk about Saros, Housmarque, or anything gaming in general!

If you’re worried about delays, you shouldn’t be, as Saros has gone gold.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton
